items.title: Effects of resistance-band shoulder exercise on pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis: a pilot randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A pilot randomized controlled trial with 28 diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis suggested that resistance-band shoulder exercises may improve pain, range of motion, and functional disability.
items.curatedReason: 针对糖尿病合并粘连性肩囊炎的患者，阻力带肩部锻炼可能有助于缓解疼痛、改善活动度和功能。但这是一个小样本试点研究，还需要更大规模的 RCT 来确证其临床效益。
items.titleZh: 阻力带肩部锻炼对糖尿病合并粘连性肩囊炎患者疼痛、活动度和功能障碍的影响：一项试点随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 28 名糖尿病合并粘连性肩囊炎成年人的试点随机对照试验表明，阻力带肩部锻炼可能改善疼痛、活动度和功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Resistance-band shoulder exercises may help alleviate pain, improve range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis. However, this is a small pilot study, and larger RCTs are needed to confirm its clinical benefits.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本试点研究，样本量为 28 例，不足以得出确切的临床实践改变结论。
items.limitationEn: This is a small pilot study with a sample size of 28, insufficient to draw definitive conclusions for clinical practice changes.

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: Implementation of the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) bundled payment model in the US led to a significant decrease in the proportion of hospitals delivering prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement, with a difference-in-differences analysis showing a clear negative effect.
items.curatedReason: 美国捆绑支付模式（CJR）导致住院膝髋关节置换术前的康复（prehabilitation）服务提供显著下降。这直接影响了 PT 诊所的转诊和收入，促使你重新审视支付模式变化对服务结构的影响，并可能调整你的服务模式以适应政策。
items.titleZh: 强制捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务提供的影响
items.summaryZh: 美国强制性捆绑支付模式（CJR）实施后，下肢关节置换术前的康复服务提供比例显著下降，一项差异中的差异分析显示了明显的负面影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: The US bundled payment model (CJR) significantly decreased prehabilitation delivery for inpatient lower extremity joint replacement. This directly impacts PT clinics' referrals and revenue, urging you to re-evaluate how payment model changes affect service structures and potentially adjust your service delivery to adapt to policy shifts.
items.limitation: 本研究是观察性分析，无法确证捆绑支付是导致康复服务下降的唯一原因，且数据来源于Medicare，可能不完全适用于其他支付方。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, so it cannot definitively confirm that bundled payment is the sole cause of decreased rehabilitation services, and data is from Medicare, which may not fully apply to other payers.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Effects of multimodal balance training with and without auditory cues on balance, gait mobility, risk of fall and quality of life in patients with chronic stroke
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 42 chronic stroke survivors found that multimodal balance training combined with auditory cues may improve balance, gait mobility, fall risk, and quality of life more effectively than the same training without auditory cues.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性卒中患者，多模式平衡训练结合听觉提示可能在改善平衡、步态移动、降低跌倒风险和生活质量方面比单纯训练更有效。这个小样本 RCT 提示了多感官整合在神经康复中的潜力，值得你在设计个性化训练方案时考虑。
items.titleZh: 多模式平衡训练结合/不结合听觉提示对慢性卒中患者平衡、步态移动、跌倒风险和生活质量的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 42 名慢性卒中幸存者的随机对照试验发现，结合听觉提示的多模式平衡训练在改善平衡、步态移动、跌倒风险和生活质量方面可能比不结合听觉提示的训练更有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic stroke patients, multimodal balance training with auditory cues may be more effective than training alone in improving balance, gait mobility, fall risk, and quality of life. This small-sample RCT suggests the potential of multisensory integration in neurorehabilitation, worth considering when designing personalized training programs.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（42 名参与者），且为单中心研究，结果的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (42 participants) and is single-center, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Beyond "Biomedical-Plus": Reclaiming the biopsychosocial model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy.
items.summary: This perspective piece argues that the biopsychosocial (BPS) model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy often defaults to a "biomedical-plus" approach, suggesting that deeper integration requires professional confidence, role clarity, and compassionate communication (the 3Cs).
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会模型（BPS）在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中的应用需要更深层次的整合，超越“生物医学+”模式。你需要通过增强职业自信、明确角色定位和运用同理心沟通，真正实践 BPS。
items.titleZh: 超越“生物医学+”：在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中回归生物心理社会模型
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章指出，生物心理社会（BPS）模型在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中常沦为“生物医学+”模式，提出更深层次的整合需通过职业自信、角色清晰和同理心沟通（3C）来实现。
items.curatedReasonEn: The biopsychosocial (BPS) model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy needs deeper integration beyond a "biomedical-plus" approach. You need to genuinely practice BPS by enhancing professional confidence, clarifying your role, and employing compassionate communication.

items.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated combined biopsychosocial interventions for chronic low back pain, showing effectiveness in reducing pain and functional disability compared to usual care, waiting lists, or unimodal interventions.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析确立了联合生物心理社会干预对慢性腰痛的有效性。在临床实践中，你应该继续优先考虑结合运动疗法、疼痛教育和心理策略的多模式方法。
items.titleZh: 联合生物心理社会干预对慢性腰痛有效性的系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了联合生物心理社会干预对慢性腰痛的有效性，结果显示其在减轻疼痛和功能障碍方面优于常规护理、等待名单或单一模式干预。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis establishes the effectiveness of combined biopsychosocial interventions for chronic low back pain. In clinical practice, you should continue to prioritize multi-modal approaches combining exercise therapy, pain education, and psychological strategies.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告不同干预结构下效果的一致性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the consistency of effects across different intervention structures.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials

items.title: Comparative efficacy of different joint mobilization techniques in shoulder adhesive capsulitis: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis compared the clinical effects of different non-thrust joint mobilization approaches for shoulder adhesive capsulitis, analyzing randomized controlled trials published between 2000 and 2025.
items.curatedReason: 对于肩关节粘连性囊炎，不同非推拿关节松动技术（non-thrust joint mobilization）的疗效比较有了新的系统综述和荟萃分析。这支持你在临床中根据患者情况和现有证据，更精准地选择和应用不同松动技术。
items.titleZh: 不同关节松动技术治疗肩关节粘连性囊炎的比较疗效：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析比较了不同非推拿关节松动技术治疗肩关节粘连性囊炎的临床效果，分析了 2000 年至 2025 年间发表的随机对照试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: For shoulder adhesive capsulitis, a new systematic review and meta-analysis compares the efficacy of different non-thrust joint mobilization techniques. This supports you in making more precise choices and applications of various mobilization techniques in clinical practice, based on patient condition and current evidence.
items.limitation: 研究未明确指出各技术间的显著疗效差异或最佳技术选择。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly highlight significant efficacy differences or optimal technique selection among the various techniques.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Outpatient rehabilitation can prevent suicide after acquired brain injury.
items.summary: A registry study of 591 patients with acquired brain injury found that outpatient rehabilitation can prevent suicide, showing a higher frequency of suicide after stroke and traumatic brain injury than in the general population.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，门诊康复可能降低获得性脑损伤（ABI）患者的自杀风险。这提醒你，作为康复专业人员，你在 ABI 患者管理中不仅仅是功能恢复者，更是整体心理健康和生命安全的守护者。
items.titleZh: 门诊康复可预防获得性脑损伤后的自杀
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 591 名获得性脑损伤患者的注册研究发现，门诊康复可以预防自杀，表明卒中和创伤性脑损伤后的自杀频率高于一般人群。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that outpatient rehabilitation may reduce suicide risk in patients with acquired brain injury (ABI). This reminds you, as a rehabilitation professional, that your role in ABI patient management extends beyond functional recovery to include safeguarding overall mental health and life safety.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性注册研究，可能存在未控制的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective registry study, which may have uncontrolled confounding factors.

items.title: [Correspondence] From targets to minutes: making movement advice actionable
items.summary: This correspondence emphasizes shifting physical activity messaging from aspirational thresholds to achievable marginal gains, suggesting that small increases in activity among the least active yield the greatest population benefit, aligning with WHO guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这项评论强调了将体力活动建议从“目标”转向“分钟数”的实用性。在给患者提供运动建议时，你应侧重于鼓励微小但渐进的活动量增加，尤其对于活动量最低的人群，这能带来最大的群体健康效益。
items.titleZh: 从目标到分钟：让运动建议更具可操作性
items.summaryZh: 这篇通信强调将体力活动信息从宏伟目标转向可实现的微小增量，表明即便对最不活跃的人群，小幅活动量增加也能带来最大的群体效益，这与世卫组织指南相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the practicality of shifting physical activity advice from "targets" to "minutes." When providing exercise recommendations, you should focus on encouraging small but incremental increases in activity, especially for the least active individuals, as this yields the greatest population health benefits.

items.title: Exploring equity in telehealth interventions in physiotherapy: A meta-epidemiological study.
items.summary: A meta-epidemiological study assessed equity in physiotherapy telehealth interventions using the PROGRESS-Plus framework, including 94 telehealth equity trials, to understand factors influencing health outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 远程医疗的公平性不容忽视。这项荟萃流行病学研究（包含 94 项试验）运用 PROGRESS-Plus 框架评估物理治疗远程医疗，明确指出社会梯度对健康结局的影响。你在设计和推行远程医疗项目时，务必将公平性置于核心，确保覆盖面和可及性。
items.titleZh: 探讨物理治疗远程医疗干预中的公平性：一项荟萃流行病学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项荟萃流行病学研究利用 PROGRESS-Plus 框架评估了物理治疗远程医疗干预中的公平性，纳入 94 项远程医疗公平性试验，以理解影响健康结局的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Equity in telehealth is paramount. This meta-epidemiological study (94 trials) applying the PROGRESS-Plus framework to physiotherapy telehealth clearly shows the influence of social gradients on health outcomes. When designing and implementing telehealth programs, you must prioritize equity to ensure comprehensive coverage and accessibility.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的公平性评估结果或干预措施效果数据。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific equity assessment results or intervention effectiveness data.

items.title: Digital Addiction and Body Balance: An Investigation of Postural Stability in Young Adults: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 74 young adults (mean age 22.06 ± 6.66 years) found that digital addiction may impair postural balance, especially during attention-demanding tasks, highlighting the importance for physiotherapy.
items.curatedReason: 长时间使用数字设备可能影响年轻人的姿势平衡。评估患者的姿势稳定性时，需要考虑其数字设备使用习惯，尤其是在执行注意力任务时平衡控制的潜在改变。
items.titleZh: 数字成瘾与身体平衡：一项针对年轻人姿势稳定性的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 74 名年轻人（平均年龄 22.06 ± 6.66 岁）的横断面研究发现，数字成瘾可能损害姿势平衡，尤其是在执行注意力任务时，强调了这对物理治疗的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Prolonged digital device use may affect postural balance in young adults. When assessing patients' postural stability, consider their digital device habits, especially the potential changes in balance control during attention-demanding tasks.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Assessment and Management Practices for Post-Stroke Shoulder Pain Among Rehabilitation Professionals in Vietnam: A Cross-Sectional Survey.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey investigated the assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain among rehabilitation professionals in Vietnam, aiming to identify evidence-practice gaps and barriers to effective care.
items.curatedReason: 在管理卒中后肩痛时，不同地区和背景下的实践差异可能很大。这提醒你应关注并识别自身实践与循证指南之间的潜在差距，并探究影响有效护理的障碍。
items.titleZh: 越南康复专业人员卒中后肩痛评估与管理实践的横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面调查研究了越南康复专业人员在卒中后肩痛评估和管理方面的实践，旨在识别循证与实践之间的差距以及有效护理的障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Practices for managing post-stroke shoulder pain can vary significantly across regions and settings. This reminds you to identify potential gaps between your own practice and evidence-based guidelines, and to explore barriers to effective care.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，无法评估实践变化的趋势或干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey cannot assess trends in practice changes or the effectiveness of interventions.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: The Combined Use of Non-Invasive Neurostimulation with Interactive Digital Technologies in Spinal Cord Injury Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped the empirical evidence on the combined use of non-invasive neurostimulation with interactive digital technologies in spinal cord injury rehabilitation, identifying 494 unique records across seven databases.
items.curatedReason: 神经刺激与交互式数字技术结合用于脊髓损伤康复，这领域很新，但我们还没摸清全貌。这份范围综述（涵盖 494 份记录）提示该联合疗法有潜力，但在临床应用前，还需大量高质量研究来明确其有效性和最佳实践。
items.titleZh: 非侵入性神经刺激与交互式数字技术联合应用于脊髓损伤康复的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述绘制了非侵入性神经刺激与交互式数字技术联合应用于脊髓损伤康复的实证证据图谱，从七个数据库中识别出 494 条独立记录。
items.curatedReasonEn: The combination of neurostimulation and interactive digital technologies for spinal cord injury rehabilitation is a nascent field. This scoping review (494 records) suggests potential, but extensive high-quality research is still needed to establish efficacy and best practices before widespread clinical adoption.
items.limitation: 范围综述仅提供证据概览，不评估干预措施的疗效或安全性。
items.limitationEn: A scoping review only provides an overview of evidence and does not assess the efficacy or safety of interventions.

items.title: A scoping review of outcome and outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury.
items.summary: A scoping review synthesized outcome domains and measures from core outcome sets and standard outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury to support standardized outcome measurement in neurorehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 标准化结局测量是构建学习型健康系统不可或缺的一步。这份范围综述汇集了脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤的核心结局域和测量指标，你可以此为基础，在神经康复实践中推动跨疾病的评估统一化。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人结局及其测量集范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述综合了脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人核心结局集和标准结局测量集中的结局域和测量方法，以支持神经康复中的标准化结局测量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Standardized outcome measurement is a critical step for building learning health systems. This scoping review synthesizes core outcome domains and measures for spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury. Use this as a foundation to advocate for unified cross-condition assessments in your neurorehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 范围综述只提供现有结局指标的概览，不评估其质量或在特定临床情境下的适用性。
items.limitationEn: A scoping review only provides an overview of existing outcome measures and does not assess their quality or applicability in specific clinical contexts.

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of eight physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, highlighting the importance of facilitating well-being, embracing the body as a central starting point, and creating a safe alliance with the child.
items.curatedReason: 治疗脑瘫患儿疼痛的物理治疗师经验强调了建立安全、信任和尊重的联盟的重要性，同时要平衡缓解疼痛的责任与并非总是可能实现这一目标的现实。这提醒你，在处理儿科疼痛时，同理心和关系建立与身体治疗同等重要。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是帮助他们过上有意义的生活。” — 物理治疗师治疗脑瘫患儿疼痛的经验：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了八名物理治疗师治疗脑瘫患儿疼痛的经验，强调了促进福祉、将身体视为核心起点以及与患儿建立安全联盟的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physiotherapists' experiences treating pain in children with cerebral palsy highlight the importance of building alliances of safety, trust, and respect, while balancing the responsibility to alleviate pain with the reality that it's not always possible. This reminds you that empathy and relationship-building are as crucial as physical therapy when addressing pediatric pain.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（8名物理治疗师），结果的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study (N=590) developed a machine learning model to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters, defining reduced exercise tolerance as peak oxygen uptake.
items.curatedReason: 术后早期预测心血管手术患者运动不耐受的能力，能够帮助你更早地识别高风险患者，并可能更积极地调整康复计划。注意研究在 3 个月后评估结局，这有助于你进行中期康复规划。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究（N=590）开发了一个机器学习模型，利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后 3 个月时的运动能力下降，并将运动耐量下降定义为峰值摄氧量。
items.curatedReasonEn: The ability to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery (defined by peak oxygen uptake) using a machine learning model (N=590) is noteworthy. Early identification of high-risk patients allows for earlier intervention, but this is a retrospective cohort study; prospective RCTs are needed to validate its clinical utility.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和结果的外推性限制。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center retrospective cohort study, potentially subject to selection bias and limitations in generalizability.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: From mechanics to mobilization: a biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars
items.summary: A systematic review proposed a biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars, integrating strategies for both abdominal wall and uterine scars, addressing a lack of standardization in current approaches.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述为剖宫产相关瘢痕康复提供了一个基于生物力学信息的新框架，整合了浅层和深层瘢痕的康复策略。这提示你在评估和治疗剖宫产瘢痕时，需要超越传统表层处理，考虑更深层的生物力学影响。
items.titleZh: 从力学到动员：剖宫产相关瘢痕的生物力学康复框架：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述提出了一个基于生物力学信息的剖宫产相关瘢痕康复框架，整合了腹壁和子宫瘢痕的康复策略，以解决当前方法中缺乏标准化的不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review offers a new biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars, integrating strategies for both superficial and deep scars. This suggests that when evaluating and treating cesarean scars, you need to look beyond traditional superficial treatments and consider deeper biomechanical impacts.
items.limitation: 此为基于现有文献的框架性综述，缺乏统一的治疗方案和疗效对比数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a framework review based on existing literature, lacking standardized treatment protocols and comparative efficacy data.

items.title: Applications of ICF-Based Assessments and Interventions in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation: A Narrative Review.
items.summary: A narrative review identified 546 ICF-based assessments across 166 studies in post-stroke rehabilitation, demonstrating over 80% overlap with topics in the United Kingdom Stroke Guideline, primarily focusing on Body Function.
items.curatedReason: 本综述显示，ICF 框架在卒中康复评估和干预中应用广泛，且与英国卒中指南高度契合。虽然缺乏具体效应量，但其强调了将 ICF 作为临床实践和指南整合工具的价值。
items.titleZh: ICF 在卒中后康复评估与干预中的应用：叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一项叙述性综述发现，在 166 项研究中共有 546 种基于 ICF 的卒中后康复评估方法，与英国卒中指南的主题重叠超过 80%，主要侧重于身体功能层面。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review demonstrates the widespread application of the ICF framework in stroke rehabilitation assessment and interventions, showing high alignment with the UK Stroke Guideline. While lacking specific effect sizes, it highlights ICF's value as an integration tool for clinical practice and guidelines.
items.limitation: 本综述为叙述性综述，未能提供基于循证的 ICF 应用具体效果量。
items.limitationEn: This narrative review did not provide evidence-based effect sizes for ICF applications.

items.title: Kinesiotaping May Reduce Early Swelling After Knee Replacement, states study
items.summary: A randomized study of 136 patients found that adding kinesiotaping to standard rehabilitation after total knee arthroplasty reduced early postoperative knee swelling and led to a modest improvement in knee flexion.
items.curatedReason: 肌内效贴布（Kinesiotaping）辅助标准康复可能减少全膝关节置换术（TKA）早期肿胀并轻度改善屈膝活动度。这是一个低成本的辅助手段，但效应量有限，别期望它能彻底改变术后恢复，应作为短期支持性干预。
items.titleZh: 研究称肌内效贴布可减少膝关节置换术后早期肿胀
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 136 名患者的随机研究发现，在全膝关节置换术后标准康复中增加肌内效贴布治疗，可减少术后早期膝关节肿胀，并使膝关节屈曲度得到适度改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesiotaping as an adjunct to standard rehabilitation may reduce early swelling and modestly improve knee flexion after total knee arthroplasty (TKA). This is a low-cost adjunctive measure, but its effect size is limited; do not expect it to fundamentally alter postoperative recovery. It should be considered a short-term supportive intervention.
items.limitation: 研究强调需要进一步探究这些益处是否持续并改善以患者为中心的结局。
items.limitationEn: The study noted further research is needed to determine if these benefits persist and improve patient-centered outcomes.

items.title: Effects of square-step exercise on fear of falling in older patients with ischemic stroke: a cluster randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A cluster randomized controlled trial involving 62 older ischemic stroke patients found that square-step exercise improved fall fear, balance, and activities of daily living, and reduced fall risk.
items.curatedReason: 方步运动（square-step exercise）能有效降低老年缺血性卒中患者的跌倒恐惧。这个 RCT 证实了特定运动干预在改善心理结局方面的潜力，可作为神经康复中预防跌倒的补充手段。
items.titleZh: 方步运动对老年缺血性卒中患者跌倒恐惧的影响：一项集群随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 62 名老年缺血性卒中患者的集群随机对照试验发现，方步运动改善了跌倒恐惧、平衡能力和日常生活活动，并降低了跌倒风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Square-step exercise effectively reduces fear of falling in older patients with ischemic stroke. This RCT confirms the potential of specific exercise interventions in improving psychological outcomes and can be used as an adjunct to fall prevention in neurological rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（62 例），可能限制了结果的普遍性，且未报告长期随访数据。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (62 patients) may limit generalizability, and long-term follow-up data were not reported.

items.title: γ-transcranial alternating current stimulation improves upper-limb motor function in stroke patients and modulates oscillatory imbalance: a pilot randomized controlled trial | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A pilot randomized controlled trial demonstrated that γ-transcranial alternating current stimulation improved upper-limb motor function in stroke patients and modulated oscillatory imbalance.
items.curatedReason: 一项小型 RCT 显示，γ-经颅交流电刺激 (γ-tACS) 可改善卒中患者的上肢运动功能并调节皮层振荡失衡。这提示 tACS 可能成为神经调控干预的新方向，但鉴于样本量小，短期内别急于推广。
items.titleZh: γ-经颅交流电刺激改善卒中患者上肢运动功能并调节振荡失衡：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项试点随机对照试验显示，γ-经颅交流电刺激改善了卒中患者的上肢运动功能并调节了振荡失衡。
items.curatedReasonEn: A small RCT suggests that γ-transcranial alternating current stimulation (γ-tACS) may improve upper-limb motor function and modulate oscillatory imbalance in stroke patients. This indicates tACS could be a new direction for neuro-modulation interventions, but given the small sample size, do not rush to widespread adoption.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的试点 RCT，样本量小，需要更大规模的研究来验证其疗效和长期效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot RCT with a small sample size, requiring larger studies to validate its efficacy and long-term effects.

items.title: The effect of an eight-week FIFA 11+ program on the landing error scoring system following functional fatigue in adolescent female soccer players with dynamic knee valgus | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: An eight-week FIFA 11+ program significantly improved the Landing Error Scoring System (LESS) following functional fatigue in adolescent female soccer players with dynamic knee valgus.
items.curatedReason: FIFA 11+ 方案可改善青少年女性足球运动员在功能性疲劳后的着陆错误评分系统（LESS），这对于降低 ACL 损伤风险至关重要。将此方案纳入青少年女性运动员的训练常规，有助于提高预防效果。
items.titleZh: 八周 FIFA 11+ 方案对青少年女性足球运动员动态膝外翻功能性疲劳后着陆错误评分系统的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，为期八周的 FIFA 11+ 方案显著改善了青少年女性足球运动员在动态膝外翻和功能性疲劳后的着陆错误评分系统（LESS）表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: The FIFA 11+ program can improve the Landing Error Scoring System (LESS) after functional fatigue in adolescent female soccer players, which is crucial for reducing ACL injury risk. Incorporating this program into adolescent female athletes' training routines can enhance prevention effectiveness.
items.limitation: 研究虽然是随机对照试验，但只评估了 8 周干预的短期效果，缺乏长期随访数据来确认 ACL 损伤发生率的实际降低。
items.limitationEn: Although a randomized controlled trial, the study only evaluated the short-term effects of an 8-week intervention, lacking long-term follow-up data to confirm an actual reduction in ACL injury incidence.

items.title: Let's talk about sex (and gender) after ACL injury: a ...
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis from 2023 investigated sex and gender differences in self-reported activity and knee-related outcomes following anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤后的康复，性别差异确实存在。这项 2023 年的系统综述提示，你需要考虑这些差异，为不同性别的患者提供更个性化的康复目标和预期管理，因为他们在活动水平和膝关节结局上可能表现不同。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤后性别（sex and gender）对自我报告活动和膝关节相关结局的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项 2023 年的系统综述和荟萃分析调查了前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤后，自我报告的活动和膝关节相关结局中的性别和社会性别差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sex differences in ACL recovery are real. This 2023 systematic review suggests you need to consider these variations to provide more personalized rehabilitation goals and expectation management for patients of different sexes, as they may show different activity levels and knee-related outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是自我报告结果，可能存在回忆偏差和主观性，且无法推断因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on self-reported outcomes, which may be subject to recall bias and subjectivity, and causality cannot be inferred.

items.title: Action observation therapy in pediatric cerebral palsy: an fNIRS-based ...
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial investigated the effects of action observation therapy (AOT) on cortical responses and balance in pediatric cerebral palsy patients using fNIRS, finding improvements in balance.
items.curatedReason: 在小儿脑瘫患者的康复中，动作观察疗法（AOT）不只改善平衡，这项 RCT 还用 fNIRS 证实了它能调节皮层反应。这支持了 AOT 作为一种非侵入性神经康复手段，并可能为你开辟新的干预思路。
items.titleZh: 小儿脑瘫动作观察疗法：基于 fNNIRS 的皮层反应和平衡研究——一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验利用 fNIRS 研究了动作观察疗法（AOT）对小儿脑瘫患者皮层反应和平衡的影响，发现平衡有所改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: In pediatric cerebral palsy rehabilitation, Action Observation Therapy (AOT) doesn't just improve balance; this RCT, using fNIRS, confirms it also modulates cortical responses. This supports AOT as a non-invasive neurorehabilitation tool and may open new avenues for intervention.
items.limitation: 这项 RCT 是基于 fNIRS 的试点研究，样本量和随访时间有限，需要更大规模的研究来确证其长期临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This fNIRS-based pilot RCT has a limited sample size and follow-up period, and larger studies are needed to confirm its long-term clinical efficacy.

items.title: Handgrip and leg strength and risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged ≥ 80 years: a prospective HUNT study
items.summary: A prospective HUNT study found that handgrip and leg strength were associated with the risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged 80 years and older.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性 HUNT 研究发现，80 岁及以上老年人的握力和腿部力量与严重跌倒损伤风险相关。这强调了你作为物理治疗师，在对极高龄患者进行跌倒风险评估时，应高度关注这些基础力量指标。
items.titleZh: 80 岁及以上成年人握力和腿部力量与严重跌倒损伤风险：一项前瞻性 HUNT 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性 HUNT 研究发现，80 岁及以上成年人的握力和腿部力量与严重跌倒损伤风险相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective HUNT study found that handgrip and leg strength are associated with the risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged 80 years and older. This emphasizes that as a physical therapist, you should pay close attention to these basic strength indicators when assessing fall risk in very elderly patients.
items.limitation: 研究仅建立了力量与跌倒损伤风险的关联性，无法确立因果关系，也未直接评估干预措施的效果。
items.limitationEn: The study only established an association between strength and fall injury risk, without establishing causality or directly evaluating intervention effectiveness.

items.title: Associations of physical activity, pain intensity, and quality of life with work ability among Nigerian nurses with mechanical low back pain: a cross-sectional survey
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey in Nigeria explored associations of physical activity, pain intensity, and quality of life with work ability among nurses experiencing mechanical low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 尼日利亚护士的机械性下腰痛与身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量之间的关联提示，在职业健康干预中应关注这些因素，以提高工作能力。这为发展针对职业人群的康复方案提供了背景信息。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚机械性下腰痛护士的身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量与工作能力的相关性：横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 一项在尼日利亚进行的横断面调查探讨了患有机械性下腰痛的护士中，身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量与工作能力之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Associations between physical activity, pain intensity, and quality of life with work ability in Nigerian nurses with mechanical low back pain suggest these factors should be addressed in occupational health interventions to improve work ability. This provides context for developing rehabilitation programs for occupational populations.
items.limitation: 作为一项横断面研究，无法确立身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量与工作能力之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality between physical activity, pain intensity, quality of life, and work ability.

items.title: Single-session pelvic prehabilitation improves continence recovery after robot-assisted radical prostatectomy: a prospective comparative study
items.summary: A prospective comparative study found that a single-session pelvic prehabilitation significantly improved continence recovery after robot-assisted radical prostatectomy.
items.curatedReason: 单次盆底肌术前康复训练能改善机器人辅助前列腺癌根治术后的控尿功能恢复。这个前瞻性研究为临床早期引入盆底肌训练提供了支持，即便单次干预也有助益。
items.titleZh: 单次盆底术前康复训练可改善机器人辅助前列腺癌根治术后的控尿功能恢复：一项前瞻性比较研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性比较研究发现，单次盆底术前康复训练显著改善了机器人辅助前列腺癌根治术后的控尿功能恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: A single session of pelvic prehabilitation improves continence recovery after robot-assisted radical prostatectomy. This prospective study supports early implementation of pelvic floor muscle training, even as a single intervention, to aid in recovery.
items.limitation: 作为前瞻性比较研究，非随机设计可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: As a prospective comparative study, the non-randomized design may introduce selection bias.

items.title: Bypass neural interfaces for paralysis: clinical translation, challenges and future directions | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A review explored the clinical translation, challenges, and future directions of bypass neural interfaces for paralysis, which re-establish functional communication across disrupted neural pathways.
items.curatedReason: 旁路神经接口技术在瘫痪康复中的临床转化、挑战和未来方向的综述，对理解先进神经工程在神经康复中的潜力很有价值。它展示了未来 PT 实践与高科技结合的可能性。
items.titleZh: 瘫痪旁路神经接口：临床转化、挑战与未来方向
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了旁路神经接口用于瘫痪的临床转化、挑战和未来方向，这些接口重建了受损神经通路的功能性交流。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review of bypass neural interfaces for paralysis, covering clinical translation, challenges, and future directions, is valuable for understanding the potential of advanced neuroengineering in neurological rehabilitation. It demonstrates the future possibilities of PT practice integrating with high technology.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要关注技术进展和潜力，缺乏具体临床疗效的量化数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review focused on technological advancements and potential, lacking quantitative data on specific clinical efficacy.

items.title: Predictors of discharge destination of stroke patients from inpatient rehabilitation center, including difficult discharge cases
items.summary: A research study investigated predictors of discharge destination for stroke patients from inpatient rehabilitation centers, including factors contributing to difficult discharge cases.
items.curatedReason: 预测卒中患者从住院康复中心出院目的地，包括出院困难病例的因素，对优化康复路径和资源分配具有重要意义。这有助于你更好地为患者规划出院方案。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者出院目的地预测因素，包括困难出院病例
items.summaryZh: 一项研究调查了卒中患者从住院康复中心出院目的地的预测因素，包括导致困难出院病例的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Identifying predictors of discharge destination for stroke patients from inpatient rehabilitation centers, including difficult discharge cases, is crucial for optimizing rehabilitation pathways and resource allocation. This helps you better plan discharge options for patients.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，可能存在混杂因素，且其结果需要多中心、大规模研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, which may have confounding factors, and its results require validation through multi-center, large-scale studies.

items.title: Diagnostic accuracy of biodex balance system stability indices under single- and dual-task conditions in individuals with chronic ankle instability | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A research study investigated the diagnostic accuracy of Biodex balance system stability indices under single- and dual-task conditions in individuals with chronic ankle instability.
items.curatedReason: Biodex 平衡系统在单任务和双任务条件下，对慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的诊断准确性研究，有助于你更好地评估 CAI 患者的平衡缺陷，尤其是在动态和认知负荷下的表现。这能提升临床评估的精细度。
items.titleZh: Biodex 平衡系统稳定性指标在慢性踝关节不稳患者单任务和双任务条件下的诊断准确性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究调查了 Biodex 平衡系统稳定性指标在单任务和双任务条件下，对慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的诊断准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Research on the diagnostic accuracy of Biodex balance system stability indices under single- and dual-task conditions for chronic ankle instability (CAI) helps you better assess balance deficits in CAI patients, especially under dynamic and cognitive loads. This can enhance the precision of clinical evaluation.
items.limitation: 本研究是一项观察性研究，评估的是诊断准确性，而非干预效果，且受试者样本量有限。
items.limitationEn: This observational study assessed diagnostic accuracy, not intervention effectiveness, and had a limited sample size.

items.title: Distinct Movement-Related Cortical Control Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury: A Scoping Review
items.summary: A scoping review synthesized evidence on distinct brain activity and its impact on motor performance during motor tasks in anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) patients.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤后的运动功能障碍，可能不只是关节本身的问题。这份综述提示，大脑皮层活动的变化也扮演了角色，这提醒你在康复时，别只盯着外周，神经层面的干预或许也是重要一环。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带损伤后独特的运动相关皮层控制：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述综合了关于前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤患者在运动任务期间独特的脑活动及其对运动表现影响的证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Motor dysfunction after ACL injury might not solely be a joint issue. This review suggests altered brain activity also plays a role, reminding you not to focus solely on peripheral issues during rehabilitation; neural interventions may be an important component.
items.limitation: 这是一项范围综述，主要侧重于文献的识别和总结，而非对证据的质量进行严格评估或进行荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, primarily focused on identifying and summarizing literature, rather than rigorously assessing evidence quality or conducting meta-analysis.

items.title: Prevalence and risk factors of medial meniscal ramp lesions in patients undergoing primary anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction at a tertiary center | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: A research study at a tertiary center investigated the prevalence and risk factors of medial meniscal ramp lesions in patients undergoing primary anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 在原发性 ACL 重建术患者中，内侧半月板斜坡损伤的患病率不容忽视。这项观察研究提醒你，评估 ACL 损伤患者时，务必高度警惕这种并发损伤，早期诊断和处理至关重要。
items.titleZh: 三级中心初次前交叉韧带重建患者内侧半月板斜坡损伤的患病率和风险因素
items.summaryZh: 一项在三级中心进行的研究调查了接受初次前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术患者中，内侧半月板斜坡损伤的患病率和风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: The prevalence of medial meniscal ramp lesions in primary ACL reconstruction patients is significant. This observational study warns you to be highly vigilant for this concomitant injury when evaluating ACL injury patients; early diagnosis and management are crucial.
items.limitation: 这是一项在单一三级中心进行的研究，其结果在不同医疗环境和人群中的普适性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: This study was conducted at a single tertiary center, so the generalizability of its findings to different clinical settings and populations may be limited.

items.title: Outcome indicators and effectiveness of nutrition education for athletes: a systematic review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A systematic review assessed outcome indicators and the effectiveness of nutrition education for athletes, aiming to improve health, nutritional status, and support athletic sustainability.
items.curatedReason: 为运动员提供营养教育，关键在于知道什么有效。这项系统综述为你指明了方向：了解哪些营养教育方法能真正改善健康和运动表现，并学会如何评估其效果，以设计更科学的跨学科支持。
items.titleZh: 运动员营养教育的结局指标和有效性：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述评估了运动员营养教育的结局指标和有效性，旨在改善健康、营养状况并支持运动的可持续性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review evaluates the effectiveness and outcome indicators of nutrition education for athletes, which is crucial for you to understand what interventions are effective and how to measure their success when providing nutrition counseling and education to athletes. This helps you design more effective interdisciplinary support programs.
items.limitation: 作为系统综述，其结论受限于纳入研究的质量和异质性，可能无法给出统一的、强有力的干预建议。
items.limitationEn: As a systematic review, its conclusions are limited by the quality and heterogeneity of included studies, potentially preventing uniform, strong intervention recommendations.

items.title: Biomechanical effects of powered knee orthoses and articulated ankle-foot orthoses in people with diparetic cerebral palsy: a pilot study | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A pilot study investigated the biomechanical effects of powered knee orthoses and articulated ankle-foot orthoses in people with diparetic cerebral palsy, who often exhibit gait impairments like excessive knee flexion and ankle dorsiflexion.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步研究揭示了动力膝关节矫形器和踝足矫形器（AFO）在双瘫型脑瘫患者中的生物力学效应。这为选择合适的辅助装置提供了初步证据，有助于你根据个体步态障碍特点定制矫形器方案。
items.titleZh: 动力膝关节矫形器和踝足矫形器对双瘫型脑瘫患者的生物力学效应：一项试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项试点研究调查了动力膝关节矫形器和踝足矫形器对双瘫型脑瘫患者的生物力学效应，这些患者常表现出膝关节过度屈曲和踝关节背屈过大等步态障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study reveals the biomechanical effects of powered knee orthoses and articulated ankle-foot orthoses (AFOs) in individuals with diparetic cerebral palsy. This provides preliminary evidence for selecting appropriate assistive devices, helping you customize orthosis plans based on individual gait impairment characteristics.
items.limitation: 这是一项试点研究，样本量小，且只报告了短期的生物力学效应，缺乏长期临床功能改善的证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot study with a small sample size, reporting only short-term biomechanical effects and lacking evidence of long-term clinical functional improvement.

items.title: Can slow and (un)steady still win the race? A narrative review of developmental gait characteristics and clinical implications in children born preterm
items.summary: A narrative review discussed developmental gait characteristics and their clinical implications in children born preterm, highlighting the integration of neuromuscular maturation, postural control, and sensorimotor coordination in independent walking.
items.curatedReason: 这篇叙述性综述探讨了早产儿发育性步态特征及其临床意义，为理解早产儿步态异常的复杂性提供了深入视角。这有助于你评估和干预早产儿的运动发育迟缓，识别潜在的步态问题。
items.titleZh: 慢而（不）稳也能赢？早产儿发育性步态特征及临床意义叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇叙述性综述讨论了早产儿的发育性步态特征及其临床意义，强调了神经肌肉成熟、姿势控制和感觉运动协调在独立行走中的整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: Gait development in preterm children is unique and complex. This review provides a comprehensive framework for understanding preterm gait characteristics, helping you more accurately assess and intervene in their motor development issues, and avoid misinterpreting normal developmental variations as pathology.
items.limitation: 这是一篇叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且未能提供量化的综合证据或明确的干预指南。
items.limitationEn: This narrative review may be subject to selection bias and does not provide quantified composite evidence or clear intervention guidelines.

items.title: Age- and sex-specific percentile curves for gross and fine motor skills in early childhood: an analysis from the SUNRISE International Study
items.summary: An analysis from the SUNRISE International Study provided age- and sex-specific percentile curves for gross and fine motor skills in early childhood, addressing the need for diverse reference data beyond high-income countries.
items.curatedReason: 别再只用高收入国家的参考数据来评估儿童发育了。这项 SUNRISE 国际研究提供了更具普适性的年龄和性别特异性粗大及精细运动技能百分位数曲线，这批新数据对你评估不同文化背景下儿童的运动发育至关重要。
items.titleZh: 早期儿童粗大和精细运动技能的年龄和性别特异性百分位数曲线：SUNRISE 国际研究分析
items.summaryZh: 一项来自 SUNRISE 国际研究的分析提供了早期儿童粗大和精细运动技能的年龄和性别特异性百分位数曲线，旨在满足高收入国家以外多样化参考数据的需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stop relying solely on high-income country reference data for child development. This SUNRISE International Study provides more universally applicable age- and sex-specific percentile curves for gross and fine motor skills. These new data are crucial for you to assess motor development in children from diverse cultural backgrounds.
items.limitation: 研究虽是大样本，但仍是横断面数据，不能完全替代纵向追踪研究来反映个体发育轨迹。
items.limitationEn: Although a large sample, the study provides cross-sectional data, which cannot fully replace longitudinal studies in reflecting individual developmental trajectories.

items.title: Characterization of physical health variables across fall risk appraisal groups: a cross-sectional study
items.summary: A cross-sectional study characterized physical health variables across different fall risk appraisal groups, aiming to understand factors related to fall risk in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 不同跌倒风险评估组的老年人，其身体健康变量特征各不相同。这项横断面研究提醒你，在制定跌倒预防策略时，不能一概而论，应根据患者具体的风险评估结果，更精细地匹配干预措施。
items.titleZh: 不同跌倒风险评估组身体健康变量的特征：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究描述了不同跌倒风险评估组的身体健康变量特征，旨在了解老年人跌倒风险相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Older adults in different fall risk appraisal groups exhibit distinct physical health variable characteristics. This cross-sectional study reminds you that fall prevention strategies should not be one-size-fits-all; instead, interventions must be more precisely tailored to each patient's specific risk assessment.
items.limitation: 作为横断面研究，本研究仅描述了跌倒风险组间的变量差异，无法推断因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it only describes variable differences between fall risk groups and cannot infer causality.

items.title: Low-load blood flow restriction training vs high-load resistance training for sarcopenia in older adults: a literature review
items.summary: A literature review compared low-load blood flow restriction training (BFRT) with high-load resistance training for sarcopenia in older adults, addressing the challenge of muscle strength and mass maintenance.
items.curatedReason: 对于无法承受高负荷的老年肌少症患者，BFRT 是一个有前景的替代方案，能有效维持肌肉力量和质量。在临床实践中，当你遇到这类患者时，可以考虑将低负荷 BFRT 纳入治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 低负荷血流限制训练与高负荷阻力训练治疗老年肌少症：一项文献综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇文献综述比较了低负荷血流限制训练（BFRT）与高负荷阻力训练在老年肌少症患者中的应用，旨在解决肌肉力量和质量维持的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: For older adults with sarcopenia who cannot tolerate high-load resistance training, BFRT presents a promising alternative for maintaining muscle strength and mass. You should consider integrating low-load BFRT into treatment plans for these patients when appropriate.
items.limitation: 作为文献综述，其结论的强度受限于所纳入研究的质量和异质性，缺乏荟萃分析的量化结果。
items.limitationEn: As a literature review, the strength of its conclusions is limited by the quality and heterogeneity of the included studies, lacking quantitative results from a meta-analysis.

items.title: The evaluation of the tests that can predict de novo stress urinary incontinence after advanced pelvic organ prolapse surgery: a prospective study
items.summary: A prospective study aimed to evaluate physical examination tests that can predict de novo stress urinary incontinence after advanced pelvic organ prolapse surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性研究旨在评估能预测先进盆腔器官脱垂手术后新发压力性尿失禁的体格检查测试。了解这些预测指标有助于术前风险评估和患者咨询，从而更精准地管理患者预期。
items.titleZh: 预测晚期盆腔器官脱垂手术后新发压力性尿失禁测试的评估：一项前瞻性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性研究旨在评估能够预测晚期盆腔器官脱垂手术后新发压力性尿失禁的体格检查测试。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective study evaluates physical examination tests that can predict de novo stress urinary incontinence after advanced pelvic organ prolapse surgery. Understanding these predictors aids in preoperative risk assessment and patient counseling, allowing for more precise management of patient expectations.
items.limitation: 作为一项观察性研究，其结果仍需通过更高质量的验证性研究来确证。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, its results still need to be confirmed by higher-quality validation studies.

items.title: Hamstring fascicle behavior during leg curl exercises performed at varying knee joint angles and loading intensities in individuals with a history of unilateral hamstring injury: a randomized cross-over design study
items.summary: A randomized cross-over design study examined hamstring fascicle behavior during leg curl exercises performed at varying knee joint angles and loading intensities in individuals with a history of unilateral hamstring injury.
items.curatedReason: 单侧腘绳肌损伤史的患者，他们在腿弯举时的筋束行为会因膝关节角度和负荷强度而异。这项 RCT 告诉你，为这类患者设计训练方案时，你需要更精细地调整参数，以期达到最佳康复效果。
items.titleZh: 单侧腘绳肌损伤史患者在不同膝关节角度和负荷强度下进行腿弯举时腘绳肌筋束行为的研究：一项随机交叉设计研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机交叉设计研究调查了有单侧腘绳肌损伤史的个体在不同膝关节角度和负荷强度下进行腿弯举时，腘绳肌筋束的行为。
items.curatedReasonEn: For individuals with a history of unilateral hamstring injury, fascicle behavior during leg curls varies with knee joint angle and load intensity. This RCT indicates you need to finely tune these parameters when designing training programs for these patients to achieve optimal rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究设计是交叉试验，可能存在学习效应或残余效应，且仅关注筋束行为，未直接评估临床结局。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a crossover trial, which may have learning or carryover effects, and focused only on fascicle behavior, without directly assessing clinical outcomes.

items.title: Professional reintegration after stroke: experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors.
items.summary: This brief report explores Portuguese stroke survivors' return to work experiences, focusing on perceived consequences, barriers, and enablers, with 1,175 participants completing a questionnaire 18-24 months post-stroke.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后重返工作是关键的康复目标，此研究揭示了葡萄牙卒中幸存者的真实体验，对理解患者面临的挑战和促进重返社会有参考价值。
items.titleZh: 卒中后的职业再融合：葡萄牙卒中幸存者的经验
items.summaryZh: 本简报探讨了葡萄牙卒中幸存者的重返工作经验，重点关注感知到的后果、障碍和促成因素，共有 1175 名参与者在卒中后 18-24 个月完成了问卷调查。
items.curatedReasonEn: Return to work after stroke is a critical rehabilitation goal. This study reveals the real-world experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors, providing valuable insights into patient challenges and promoting societal reintegration.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，且样本主要来自葡萄牙，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, and the sample is primarily from Portugal, limiting the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Authors' reply to: letter to the editor: occupational therapy at home E-rehabilitation (OTHER): a feasibility study of post-stroke intervention for transition to home.
items.summary: This is an author's reply to a letter concerning a feasibility study on occupational therapy at home e-rehabilitation (OTHER) for post-stroke transition to home.
items.curatedReason: 这篇是作者回复信，不是原创研究，但涉及远程康复的可行性，可作背景参考。
items.titleZh: 作者回复：关于“居家职业治疗电子康复（OTHER）——卒中后居家过渡可行性研究”的致编辑信
items.summaryZh: 这篇是作者对一封关于卒中后居家过渡的居家职业治疗电子康复（OTHER）可行性研究的致编辑信的回复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an author's reply, not original research, but it touches upon the feasibility of telerehabilitation and can be considered for background context.

items.title: Examination and treatment of the spine for upper extremity pain: a case series.
items.summary: This case series describes three patients with upper extremity pain who showed clinically significant improvements in self-reported disability and pain after receiving physical therapy treatment focused on spine mobilization or manipulation techniques.
items.curatedReason: 本系列病例提示，对于上肢疼痛，即使不符合典型牵涉痛模式，评估并处理脊柱功能障碍也可能带来显著改善。将其作为鉴别诊断和治疗策略的一个参考角度。
items.titleZh: 上肢疼痛患者的脊柱检查与治疗：病例系列研究
items.summaryZh: 本病例系列描述了三名上肢疼痛患者，在接受以脊柱松动或手法为主的物理治疗后，自我报告的残疾和疼痛均有临床显著改善，并能无痛完成日常活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case series suggests that evaluating and treating spinal dysfunction may lead to significant improvement in upper extremity pain, even when pain patterns are atypical. Consider this as a diagnostic and treatment strategy.
items.limitation: 本研究为病例系列，证据等级低，无法建立因果关系，且样本量小，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a case series, offering a low level of evidence; it cannot establish causality, has a small sample size, and limited generalizability.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Effectiveness of an individualised swimming and education programme for chronic low back pain (EduSwim): a randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT assessed an individualized swimming and education program for chronic low back pain compared to education alone, delivered via telehealth sessions over 8 weeks, with disability (RMDQ) as the primary outcome.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 为慢性非特异性腰痛的游泳干预提供了高质量证据。你可以依据这项研究，更有信心地将个体化游泳与教育方案纳入患者治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 个体化游泳与教育项目治疗慢性腰痛的有效性（EduSwim）：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验评估了为期 8 周、通过远程物理治疗提供的个体化游泳与教育项目，与单纯教育相比，对慢性腰痛患者的有效性，主要结局是残疾程度（RMDQ）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT provides high-quality evidence for swimming intervention in chronic non-specific low back pain. You can use this research to more confidently integrate individualized swimming and education programs into patient treatment plans.
items.limitation: 研究结果可能受远程物理治疗交付方式影响，外推到面诊环境需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: Results may be influenced by the telehealth delivery method, and generalization to in-person settings should be cautious.

items.title: APTA Members Unite to Advance Payment Advocacy Via New SPARC Forum and Pledge
items.summary: APTA members are uniting to advance payment advocacy through the newly formed SPARC Forum and a pledge to support these efforts.
items.curatedReason: APTA 成立新论坛 SPARC，旨在推进支付倡导。这将直接影响你在美国市场上的物理治疗报销环境和执业收入，务必关注其后续动向。
items.titleZh: APTA 成员通过新 SPARC 论坛和承诺团结起来推动支付倡导。
items.summaryZh: APTA 成员正通过新成立的 SPARC 论坛及相关承诺，共同推进支付倡导工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA has launched SPARC, a new forum to advance payment advocacy. This will directly impact the physical therapy reimbursement environment and your practice revenue in the US market, so be sure to monitor its developments.

items.title: A systematic review of current evidence on clinical outcomes of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques in sacroiliac joint dysfunction.
items.summary: This systematic review evaluated the clinical efficacy of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques for sacroiliac joint dysfunction, searching databases for studies published between January 2021 and December 2025.
items.curatedReason: 关于腰骶关节功能障碍的手法治疗，该系统综述应能帮你厘清腰椎翻滚和改良 SIMS 手法作为干预的最新证据，指导你的临床实践。
items.titleZh: 腰骶关节功能障碍中腰椎翻滚和改良 SIMS 手法治疗临床效果的系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 该系统综述评估了腰椎翻滚和改良 SIMS 手法治疗骶髂关节功能障碍的临床疗效，检索了 2021 年 1 月至 2025 年 12 月发表的相关研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review on manual therapy for sacroiliac joint dysfunction should clarify the latest evidence for lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation, guiding your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究仅纳入了 2021-2025 年间发表的文献，可能错过早期重要研究。
items.limitationEn: The review only included studies published between 2021 and 2025, potentially missing earlier significant research.

items.title: In adult patients with brainstem strokes, does dysphagia rehabilitation improve health-related outcomes compared to usual care for inpatients? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis with 12 studies and 443 participants explored the effectiveness of dysphagia rehabilitation in inpatients with brainstem stroke, categorizing interventions into traditional swallowing therapy or device inclusion.
items.curatedReason: 脑干卒中住院患者的吞咽康复，目前看来，传统吞咽疗法或结合器械干预都有一定效果。作为系统综述和荟萃分析，它总结了 12 项研究，为选择干预方案提供了当前最佳证据。
items.titleZh: 脑干卒中成人住院患者的吞咽康复是否能改善健康相关结局？一项系统综述与荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项包含 12 项研究、443 名参与者的系统综述与荟萃分析探讨了脑干卒中住院患者吞咽康复的有效性，将干预措施分为传统吞咽疗法或器械辅助。
items.curatedReasonEn: For dysphagia rehabilitation in inpatients with brainstem stroke, both traditional swallowing therapy and device-inclusive interventions appear beneficial. As a systematic review and meta-analysis, it consolidates 12 studies, offering the best current evidence for intervention selection.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能影响荟萃分析的整体结论。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies may affect the overall conclusions of the meta-analysis.

items.title: Responsiveness of the Arabic version of the lower extremity functional scale in individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders.
items.summary: This study examined the responsiveness of the Arabic version of the Lower Extremity Functional Scale (LEFS) in 74 participants with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders, finding its change scores correlated well with other outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: LEFS 阿拉伯语版在下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中显示出良好的响应性。如果你服务阿拉伯语患者，该量表是一个可靠的评估工具。
items.titleZh: 下肢功能量表阿拉伯语版在下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中的响应性。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究评估了下肢功能量表（LEFS）阿拉伯语版在 74 名下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中的响应性，发现其分数变化与其他结局测量值关联良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Arabic version of LEFS demonstrates good responsiveness in individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders. If you serve Arabic-speaking patients, this scale is a reliable assessment tool.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，样本量中等，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study with a moderate sample size, and selection bias may be present.

items.title: Correlation of Motor-Task Related Brain Activation Changes With Motor Performance Changes Induced by Constraint-Induced Therapy After Stroke.
items.summary: This study evaluated motor-task related brain activation changes and their relationship to functional recovery in 42 hemiparetic stroke participants undergoing CIMT during subacute and chronic periods, using fMRI and WMFT.
items.curatedReason: CIMT 对卒中偏瘫患者的疗效我们已知晓，但这项观察研究进一步提示，其效果可能与特定的脑激活模式改变有关。虽然是小样本（42 人）观察研究，但为理解 CIMT 的作用机制提供了神经影像学线索。
items.titleZh: 卒中后限制性运动疗法（CIMT）引起的运动任务相关脑激活变化与运动表现变化的关联。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究评估了 42 名偏瘫卒中患者在亚急性期和慢性期接受 CIMT 治疗期间，运动任务相关脑激活变化与功能恢复的关联，使用了 fMRI 和 WMFT 进行评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: While CIMT's efficacy for hemiparetic stroke patients is established, this observational study suggests its benefits may correlate with specific changes in brain activation patterns. Though a small-sample (42 participants) observational study, it offers neuroimaging clues to the mechanisms underpinning CIMT.
items.limitation: 研究的 fMRI 分析结果可能存在多重比较问题，且样本量相对较小。
items.limitationEn: The fMRI analysis results may have multiple comparison issues, and the sample size is relatively small.

items.title: Eccentric cycling for ACL-R rehabilitation: A masterclass.
items.summary: This masterclass discusses the increasing use of eccentric training in ACL-R rehabilitation, noting its potential benefits for quadriceps strength and return-to-sport performance, while emphasizing gradual and individualized implementation.
items.curatedReason: 关于 ACL 重建术后离心训练的实施，这篇综述提醒你关注早期离心训练的潜在益处。在考虑将其纳入康复计划时，要注重个体化和循序渐进。
items.titleZh: ACL 重建术后康复中的离心骑行：专家课程。
items.summaryZh: 这篇专家课程讨论了离心训练在 ACL 重建术后康复中日益增长的应用，指出其对股四头肌力量和重返运动表现的潜在益处，同时强调应循序渐进和个体化实施。
items.curatedReasonEn: Regarding the implementation of eccentric training after ACL reconstruction, this review highlights the potential benefits of early eccentric training. When considering incorporating it into rehabilitation, focus on individualization and gradual progression.
items.limitation: 本文性质更偏向专家观点或述评，缺乏系统性证据整合。
items.limitationEn: This article is more akin to an expert opinion or commentary, lacking systematic evidence integration.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Measurement Characteristics and Clinical Utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test Among People with Stroke
items.summary: A new article evaluates the measurement characteristics and clinical utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test (6MWT) for individuals with stroke, providing insights for its application in rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中患者，6MWT 仍然是你手头重要的评估工具。这篇综述确认了它在测量学特征和临床应用上的可靠性，因此请放心地将其纳入你的康复评估流程，并根据综述中的新见解来解读结果。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者 6 分钟步行试验的测量学特征和临床应用
items.summaryZh: 一篇新文章评估了卒中患者 6 分钟步行试验（6MWT）的测量学特征和临床应用价值，为该评估工具在康复实践中的使用提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 6MWT remains a key assessment tool for your stroke patients. This review confirms its reliability in terms of measurement characteristics and clinical utility. Confidently integrate it into your rehabilitation assessment process and interpret results using the new insights provided.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Modified Ghost System combining action, observation, and vibration stimulation for recovery after distal radius fracture surgery: A single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol
items.summary: A single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol describes a modified Ghost System, combining iPad-based action observation and wristband vibration, to improve recovery after distal radius fracture surgery. The study will enroll 10 adults.
items.curatedReason: Modified Ghost System 是一个探索性的方案，它简化了 VR 设备并结合振动刺激，尝试提升远端桡骨骨折术后康复效果。关注这种基于行动观察和多感官刺激的新技术，但目前只是一个小型可行性研究方案，别指望它立刻改变临床实践。
items.titleZh: 改良 Ghost System 结合行动观察和振动刺激促进远端桡骨骨折术后康复：一项单臂临床可行性研究方案
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂临床可行性研究方案描述了改良版 Ghost System，该系统结合了基于 iPad 的行动观察和腕带振动刺激，旨在改善远端桡骨骨折术后康复。该研究将招募 10 名成年人。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Modified Ghost System is an exploratory protocol that simplifies VR devices and combines vibration stimulation, aiming to improve rehabilitation outcomes after distal radius fracture surgery. Keep an eye on new technologies based on action observation and multisensory stimulation, but this is a small feasibility study protocol, so don't expect immediate changes to clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心、单臂的临床可行性研究方案，样本量小（10 人），缺乏对照组。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center, single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol with a small sample size (10 participants) and lacks a control group.

items.title: Virtual Reality-assisted Physiotherapeutic Training for Patients With Knee Osteoarthritis: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 5 RCTs found that virtual reality (VR)-assisted physiotherapy significantly improved pain (SMD = 0.40), physical function (SMD = 0.37), and balance (SMD = 0.44) in patients with knee osteoarthritis compared to traditional rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: VR 辅助物理治疗在膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛、功能和平衡方面显著优于传统康复。如果你的诊所条件允许，请考虑将 VR 引入膝骨关节炎的康复方案，尤其是在传统方法效果不佳时。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实辅助物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的效果：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 5 项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，虚拟现实辅助物理治疗在改善膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（SMD = 0.40）、身体功能（SMD = 0.37）和平衡（SMD = 0.44）方面，显著优于传统康复治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: VR-assisted physiotherapy significantly outperforms traditional rehabilitation for pain, function, and balance in knee osteoarthritis. If your clinic's resources allow, integrate VR into knee OA rehabilitation protocols, particularly when traditional methods are insufficient.
items.limitation: 该荟萃分析仅纳入了 5 项 RCT，样本量相对较小，可能影响结果的稳健性。
items.limitationEn: This meta-analysis only included 5 RCTs, and the relatively small sample size may affect the robustness of the results.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study (n=958) found that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation within six months after stroke significantly reduced the risk of post-stroke dementia compared to physical rehabilitation alone (HR = 0.65, 95% CI: 0.54-0.79, P < 0.001).
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心回顾性队列研究表明，卒中后结合物理和认知康复可以显著降低痴呆风险。这对你的临床实践具有重要指导意义，强调了早期、综合性康复干预在预防卒中后认知障碍中的作用。
items.titleZh: 物理与认知康复结合与卒中后痴呆的关系：一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究（n=958）发现，与单独进行物理康复相比，卒中后六个月内结合物理和认知康复显著降低了卒中后痴呆的风险（HR = 0.65, 95% CI: 0.54-0.79, P < 0.001）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter retrospective cohort study suggests that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation after stroke can significantly reduce the risk of dementia. This has important implications for your clinical practice, emphasizing the role of early, comprehensive rehabilitation interventions in preventing post-stroke cognitive impairment.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性队列研究，尽管进行了倾向评分匹配，仍可能存在未调整的混杂因素，影响因果推断。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, despite propensity score matching, unadjusted confounding factors may still exist, affecting causal inference.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study

items.title: The Oxford visual perception screen detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors: an early cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study.
items.summary: A prospective cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study (n=unknown) in sub-acute adult stroke survivors in the UK found that the Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detected visual perception difficulties, aligning with clinical guidelines.
items.curatedReason: 牛津视觉感知筛查（OxVPS）在亚急性期卒中幸存者中显示出早期诊断视觉感知困难的潜力。在临床实践中，你可以考虑使用 OxVPS 作为一种高效的筛查工具，以早期发现并干预卒中后的视觉感知障碍。
items.titleZh: 牛津视觉感知筛查在亚急性期成人卒中幸存者中检测视觉感知困难：一项早期横断面诊断准确性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在英国进行的亚急性期成人卒中幸存者中的前瞻性横断面诊断准确性研究（样本量未知）发现，牛津视觉感知筛查（OxVPS）能有效检测视觉感知困难，与临床指南一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) shows potential for early detection of visual perception difficulties in sub-acute stroke survivors. In clinical practice, you might consider using OxVPS as an efficient screening tool for early identification and intervention of post-stroke visual perception impairments.
items.limitation: 本研究为早期诊断准确性研究，样本量相对较小，且仅在英国进行，其结果在更大范围人群中的普适性尚待验证。
items.limitationEn: This study is an early diagnostic accuracy study with a relatively small sample size and was conducted only in the UK, so its generalizability to a broader population needs further validation.

items.title: The RESOLVE Trial: A Stepped-Wedge, Cluster-Randomized Clinical Trial Evaluating the Effects of Clinical Practice Guidelines and Psychologically Informed Physical Therapy on Low Back Pain Outcomes in Service Members and Veterans.
items.summary: A multisite, stepped-wedge, cluster-randomized trial found that implementing a combined clinical practice guideline and psychologically informed physical therapy (CPG+PIPT) strategy significantly reduced low back pain-related disability, pain, and downstream healthcare utilization in service members and veterans.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心阶梯楔形 RCT 证实，结合临床实践指南与心理知情物理治疗（CPG+PIPT）能有效改善军人和退伍军人慢性腰痛患者的残疾和疼痛，并减少下游医疗资源使用。如果你在军人或退伍军人诊所执业，应将 CPG+PIPT 整合进常规腰痛管理流程。
items.titleZh: RESOLVE 试验：评估临床实践指南与心理知情物理治疗对军人及退伍军人腰痛结局影响的阶梯楔形集群随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心、阶梯楔形、集群随机试验发现，结合临床实践指南和心理知情物理治疗（CPG+PIPT）的干预策略，显著降低了军人及退伍军人腰痛相关的残疾、疼痛，并减少了下游医疗资源使用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multisite stepped-wedge RCT confirmed that combining clinical practice guidelines with psychologically informed physical therapy (CPG+PIPT) effectively improves disability and pain and reduces downstream healthcare utilization in service members and veterans with chronic low back pain. If you practice in military or veteran clinics, you should integrate CPG+PIPT into your routine low back pain management.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于军人和退伍军人医疗环境，结果外推到普通人群时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to military and veteran healthcare settings, so caution is needed when generalizing results to the general population.

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blinded, sham-controlled trial with 49 participants found that ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation applied to the radial nerve, combined with exercise, provided mid- and long-term benefits for chronic lateral elbow pain, improving pain intensity, disability, and psychological outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，在运动项目之外增加经皮电刺激桡神经可能对慢性肱骨外上髁炎患者有中长期益处。这支持了结合多模式治疗以优化疼痛管理和功能恢复的策略。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下经皮电神经刺激联合运动治疗慢性肱骨外上髁炎的长期效益：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项有 49 例患者参与的随机、双盲、假对照临床试验显示，超声引导下的桡神经经皮电刺激结合运动治疗，对慢性肱骨外上髁炎具有中长期益处，能改善疼痛强度、残疾程度和心理结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that adding percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation to the radial nerve alongside an exercise program may offer mid- to long-term benefits for patients with chronic lateral elbow pain. This supports a multimodal approach to optimize pain management and functional recovery.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（49 例），且关注点是中长期效益，其短期或立即效应未被详细阐述。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (49 participants) and focused on mid- and long-term benefits, with short-term or immediate effects not detailed.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-center randomized controlled trial (n=54) in China found that intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding was more efficacious than nasogastric tube feeding in reducing reflux risk and supporting swallowing recovery in patients with post-stroke dysphagia over 14 days.
items.curatedReason: 间歇性口咽管喂养在减少反流风险和支持吞咽恢复方面优于持续鼻胃管喂养。面对卒中后吞咽困难患者时，你在选择喂养方式时应考虑间歇性口咽管喂养的优势。
items.titleZh: 间歇性口咽管喂养与鼻胃管喂养在卒中后吞咽困难患者中的胃肠动力、反流风险和临床疗效：一项随机对照试验的多模式评估
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国进行的单中心随机对照试验（n=54）发现，在卒中后吞咽困难患者中，间歇性口咽管喂养在 14 天内比鼻胃管喂养在降低反流风险和支持吞咽恢复方面更有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding is superior to continuous nasogastric tube feeding for reducing reflux risk and supporting swallowing recovery. When managing post-stroke dysphagia patients, you should consider the advantages of intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding for nutritional support.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心试验，样本量相对较小（54 例），结果的普遍性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: This study was a single-center trial with a relatively small sample size (54 participants), which may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: A secondary data analysis of an RCT explored adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, aiming to evaluate adherence to defined pain levels, exercise, and physiotherapy sessions among 84 patients.
items.curatedReason: 了解慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在 26 周运动干预中对疼痛阈值和治疗方案的依从性，有助于优化治疗计划和患者教育。关注患者依从性是提高长期疗效的关键。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动干预（含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗）的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的次级数据分析，探讨了 84 例慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在 26 周运动干预中对两种疼痛阈值方案、运动和物理治疗课程的依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding patient adherence to pain thresholds and treatment protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy is crucial for optimizing treatment plans and patient education. Focusing on patient adherence is key to improving long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为 RCT 的次级数据分析，关注依从性而非临床结局，其发现不能直接推论为干预有效性。
items.limitationEn: This study is a secondary data analysis of an RCT, focusing on adherence rather than clinical outcomes; its findings cannot directly infer intervention effectiveness.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: An economic evaluation alongside an RCT (n=145) in Brazil found that a Pilates exercise program was cost-effective compared with home-based exercises for individuals with chronic non-specific low back pain, from both a healthcare and societal perspective.
items.curatedReason: 普拉提训练对慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益可能优于家庭运动，这一证据支持在巴西将普拉提纳入医保。即使在非巴西市场，该研究也提示我们应考虑普拉提在成本效益方面的潜力。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与家庭运动对慢性非特异性腰痛患者的成本效益比较：一项基于试验的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项在巴西进行的随机对照试验（n=145）及其经济学评估显示，从医疗和社会角度来看，普拉提运动方案对慢性非特异性腰痛患者的成本效益优于家庭运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pilates training may be more cost-effective than home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain, supporting its inclusion in healthcare coverage in Brazil. Even outside Brazil, this study suggests considering Pilates for its potential cost-effectiveness.
items.limitation: 研究的成本效益评估仅基于巴西的医疗系统和支付方视角，结果外推到其他国家或地区时需考虑当地医保政策和成本结构差异。
items.limitationEn: The cost-effectiveness evaluation was based solely on the Brazilian healthcare system and payer perspective, so results should be cautiously extrapolated to other countries or regions, considering local healthcare policies and cost structures.

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: A motor unit decomposition analysis in 33 healthy participants found that experimentally induced acute low back pain altered force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics during a sustained spinal extension task.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了关于急性腰痛如何影响运动单位行为的神经生理学见解。虽然是实验诱导疼痛，但其结果加深了我们对疼痛对运动控制影响的理解，为未来的康复策略提供了理论基础。
items.titleZh: 实验诱导急性腰痛期间腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 33 名健康参与者进行的运动单位分解分析发现，实验诱导的急性腰痛改变了持续脊柱伸展任务中的力量稳定性和运动单位放电特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides neurophysiological insights into how acute low back pain affects motor unit behavior. Although pain was experimentally induced, its results deepen our understanding of pain's impact on motor control and provide a theoretical basis for future rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 研究通过实验诱导急性腰痛，其结果可能无法完全代表临床上复杂的慢性或自发性腰痛患者的神经生理学变化。
items.limitationEn: The study induced acute low back pain experimentally, so its results may not fully represent the neurophysiological changes in patients with complex chronic or spontaneous low back pain encountered clinically.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review of 36 studies (including 29 RCTs) explored the range, characteristics, and outcomes of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis and identified the outcome measures used for assessment, adhering to PRISMA-ScR guidelines.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了膝骨关节炎的各种生活方式干预措施及其评估指标。你可以利用这份综述全面了解现有干预手段和研究现状，但注意它本身并未提供新的临床证据。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎患者生活方式干预的探索：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项对 36 项研究（包括 29 项随机对照试验）进行的范围综述，依照 PRISMA-ScR 指南，探讨了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的范围、特征和结果，并确定了所用的评估指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review categorizes lifestyle interventions and assessment measures for knee osteoarthritis. You can use this review to comprehensively understand existing interventions and their research status, but note that it does not provide new clinical evidence.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，该研究旨在识别和映射现有证据，而非评估干预措施的有效性或进行质量分级。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, this study aimed to identify and map existing evidence, rather than evaluate the effectiveness of interventions or perform quality grading.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait in Parkinson's disease with textured insoles and auditory cue training: a randomized controlled trial study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=27) in Parkinson's disease patients (Hoehn & Yahr stages 2.5-3) found that combining textured insoles with auditory cueing provided complementary benefits for enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait compared to textured insoles alone or progressive walking training.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验提示，在帕金森病患者步态训练中结合有纹理鞋垫和听觉提示可能比单独使用有纹理鞋垫或步行训练更能改善动态姿势稳定性。这为帕金森患者的平衡和步态干预提供了新的联合方案思路。
items.titleZh: 纹理鞋垫与听觉提示训练联合增强帕金森病患者步态动态姿势稳定性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对帕金森病（Hoehn & Yahr 2.5-3 期）患者的随机对照试验（n=27）发现，与单独使用纹理鞋垫或渐进式步行训练相比，结合纹理鞋垫和听觉提示能更好地增强步态期间的动态姿势稳定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that combining textured insoles with auditory cues during gait training for Parkinson's disease patients may improve dynamic postural stability more than textured insoles or walking training alone. This offers new insights for combined interventions for balance and gait in Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（27 例），且为单中心研究，结果的普适性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (27 participants) and was single-center, which may limit the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Exploring facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors: a multi-perspective qualitative study of patients, families, and healthcare professionals.
items.summary: A multi-perspective qualitative study in Shanghai, China, conducted semi-structured interviews with 17 stroke survivors, 10 family caregivers, and 11 healthcare professionals to explore facilitators and barriers to post-stroke health behaviors related to secondary prevention, using the Adaptive Leadership Framework.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究从多方视角（患者、家属、医护人员）探讨了卒中幸存者健康行为的促进因素和障碍。这能帮助你更全面地理解患者行为背后的复杂性，从而设计更有效的二级预防干预措施。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者健康行为促进因素和障碍的探索：一项多视角定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国上海进行的多视角定性研究，通过对 17 名卒中幸存者、10 名家庭照护者和 11 名医疗专业人员进行半结构化访谈，运用适应性领导力框架，探讨了卒中后二级预防相关健康行为的促进因素和障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors from patient, family, and healthcare professional perspectives. This can help you comprehensively understand the complexity of patient behaviors and design more effective secondary prevention interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量较小（17 名卒中幸存者、10 名家属、11 名医护人员），结果主要提供深层理解而非统计学上的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, this research had a small sample size (17 stroke survivors, 10 family caregivers, 11 healthcare professionals), and its findings primarily offer in-depth understanding rather than statistical generalizability.

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review, following PRISMA-ScR guidelines, systematically mapped and synthesized current evidence on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) for stroke rehabilitation, focusing on study design, stimulation parameters, outcome measures, and reported effects.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统地总结了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复中的现有证据。尽管证据仍分散且异质性高，但你可以通过该综述了解 tSCS 作为新兴非侵入性神经调节方法的潜力和研究进展，为未来临床应用和进一步研究提供参考。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激在卒中康复中的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项遵循 PRISMA-ScR 指南的范围综述，系统地梳理和整合了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复中的现有证据，重点关注研究设计、刺激参数、结局指标和报告效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically summarizes the existing evidence on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) in stroke rehabilitation. Although the evidence remains fragmented and heterogeneous, you can use this review to understand the potential and research progress of tSCS as an emerging non-invasive neuromodulation approach, informing future clinical applications and further research.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，该研究旨在映射现有证据，而非评估干预措施的有效性或进行质量分级，因此不能直接提供关于 tSCS 确切疗效的临床建议。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, this study aimed to map existing evidence rather than evaluate intervention effectiveness or perform quality grading, thus it cannot directly provide clinical recommendations on the precise efficacy of tSCS.

items.title: Undernutrition is associated with higher rate of reamputation or survival, lower mobility and lower quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation: a longitudinal observational study
items.summary: A longitudinal observational study investigated the association between undernutrition and survival, reamputation-free survival, quality of life (QoL), wound healing, mobility, and work status post-dysvascular major lower limb amputation.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究提示，营养不良与下肢血管性截肢患者较高的再截肢率、较低的移动能力和较差的生活质量相关。这意味着在术前和术后评估患者营养状况至关重要，并应作为康复计划的一部分予以干预。
items.titleZh: 营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后较高再截肢率或生存率、较低移动能力和生活质量相关：一项纵向观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项纵向观察性研究旨在探讨营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后的生存、无再截肢生存、生活质量、伤口愈合、移动能力和工作状态之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that undernutrition is associated with higher reamputation rates, lower mobility, and poorer quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation. This implies that assessing patient nutritional status pre- and post-operatively is crucial and should be integrated into rehabilitation plans as an intervention target.
items.limitation: 作为一项观察性研究，本研究仅能揭示营养不良与结局之间的关联，不能建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, this research can only reveal associations between undernutrition and outcomes, but cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Towards strengthening rehabilitation within health systems: a scoping review of rehabilitation-specific quality indicators
items.summary: A scoping review aimed to identify, categorize, and appraise rehabilitation-specific quality indicators (QIs) with generic applicability for evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述旨在识别和评估康复特异性质量指标。如果你在康复机构从事质量管理或循证实践，这份综述能帮助你了解现有质量评估框架，并为你的服务改进和报告提供潜在的指标体系。
items.titleZh: 加强卫生系统内康复：康复特异性质量指标的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述旨在识别、分类和评估具有通用适用性的康复特异性质量指标，用于评价跨专业康复护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review aims to identify and appraise rehabilitation-specific quality indicators. If you are involved in quality management or evidence-based practice in a rehabilitation setting, this review can help you understand existing quality assessment frameworks and provide potential metrics for service improvement and reporting.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，其主要目标是识别和分类质量指标，而非对其有效性或应用效果进行实证评估。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, its primary objective is to identify and categorize quality indicators, not to empirically evaluate their effectiveness or application impact.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Perspectives of Private Practice Physical Therapy Health Care Systems Participating in a Pragmatic Clinical Trial: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A generic qualitative study, including interviews and focus groups, shared the perspectives and lived experiences of 4 private practice physical therapy health care systems participating in a pragmatic clinical trial (Fibromyalgia TENS In Physical Therapy Study, FM-TIPS) in the United States.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提供了美国私人执业物理治疗系统参与临床试验的视角和经验。这对于考虑在非学术环境中开展研究的临床医生和研究人员都具有参考价值，它能帮助你了解这类合作的潜在挑战和促进因素。
items.titleZh: 参与实用临床试验的私人执业物理治疗医疗系统的视角：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项通用定性研究，通过访谈和焦点小组，分享了美国 4 个私人执业物理治疗医疗系统参与一项实用临床试验（纤维肌痛经皮电刺激物理治疗研究，FM-TIPS）的视角和亲身经历。
